settings.heading: How long does shipping take?
settings.row_content: US orders ship within 1–2 business days via USPS. Standard delivery is 3–5 business days. Free shipping on every order, always.

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.row_content: We offer free returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused. Start your return at the link in your order confirmation email.

settings.heading: What materials are in the kit?
settings.row_content: Grade-A mulberry silk comb and scrunchie. 100% boar-bristle brush. OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified cotton hair towel. Everything arrives in a reusable keepsake gift box.

settings.heading: How do I build a hair ritual with this kit?
settings.row_content: After washing: press hair dry with the OEKO-TEX towel (no rubbing). Detangle gently with the silk comb, working from ends to roots. Finish with the boar-bristle brush for smoothness. Secure with the silk scrunchie. That’s it — five minutes, every morning.

settings.heading: Is the kit good as a gift?
settings.row_content: Yes — it ships in a ribbon-tied keepsake box. Add a personalized note at checkout. Gift receipts available on request via support@haze.hair.

settings.heading: Do you ship internationally?
settings.row_content: US shipping only for now. International shipping is coming — sign up for our email list to be first to know.
